---
id: overlay-custom-classes
title: Overlay Custom CSS Classes
sidebar_label: Custom CSS Classes
---

Reference for all available CSS classes on CompSaber overlay screens. Use these to target elements when writing custom styles.

## Bracket

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.bracket-title-text` | Screen title |
| `.bracket-title-upper` | Upper bracket round title |
| `.bracket-title-lower` | Lower bracket round title |
| `.bracket-seed-header` | Seed header |
| `.bracket-seed-id` | Seed ID (inside header) |
| `.bracket-status` | Match status badge |
| `.bracket-status-live` | Live status modifier |
| `.bracket-status-completed` | Completed status modifier |
| `.bracket-status-awaiting` | Awaiting status modifier |
| `.bracket-avatar` | Player avatar |
| `.bracket-seed-players` | Seed players container |
| `.bracket-seed-player` | Individual player row |
| `.bracket-player-hovered` | Hovered player modifier |
| `.bracket-player-one` | Player 1 modifier |
| `.bracket-player-two` | Player 2 modifier |
| `.bracket-player-name` | Player name |
| `.bracket-player-score` | Player score |

## Countdown

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.countdown-main` | Main container |
| `.countdown-timer` | Timer display |
| `.countdown-label` | Label text |

## Intermission

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.intermission-main` | Main container |
| `.intermission-title` | Schedule title |
| `.intermission-schedule-container` | Schedule container |
| `.intermission-no-matches` | Empty state label |
| `.intermission-inner-container` | Inner container |
| `.intermission-schedule-divider` | Section divider |
| `.intermission-schedule-divider-line` | Divider line |
| `.intermission-schedule-divider-text` | Divider label |
| `.intermission-match` | Match row |
| `.intermission-match-complete` | Completed match modifier |
| `.intermission-match-live` | Live match modifier |
| `.intermission-match-default` | Default match modifier |
| `.intermission-match-player-one` | Player 1 side |
| `.intermission-match-player-two` | Player 2 side |
| `.intermission-player-winner` | Winner modifier |
| `.intermission-player-default` | Default player modifier |
| `.intermission-match-number` | Match number |
| `.intermission-match-round` | Round name |
| `.intermission-match-playername` | Player name |
| `.intermission-player-flag` | Country flag |
| `.intermission-match-center` | Center cell |
| `.intermission-match-score` | Completed match score |
| `.intermission-match-live-text` | Live match text |
| `.intermission-match-vs` | VS text |
| `.intermission-match-ended` | Ended state |
| `.intermission-match-start-time` | Start time |
| `.intermission-match-unplanned` | Unplanned match |

## Player Header (top bar)

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.players-main-header` | Main header |
| `.players-logo-div` | Logo container |
| `.players-logo-inner` | Logo inner div |
| `.players-logo-img` | Logo image |
| `.players-match-info` | Match info |
| `.players-player-one` | Player 1 container |
| `.players-player-one-avatar` | Player 1 avatar |
| `.players-player-one-info` | Player 1 info container |
| `.players-player-one-innerinfo` | Player 1 info div |
| `.players-player-one-flag-img` | Player 1 flag |
| `.players-player-one-name` | Player 1 name |
| `.players-player-one-ranks` | Player 1 ranks |
| `.players-player-one-score` | Player 1 score |
| `.players-player-one-score-number` | Score number (Number style) |
| `.players-player-one-score-counter` | Score counter (Box style) |
| `.players-player-two` | Player 2 container |
| `.players-player-two-avatar` | Player 2 avatar |
| `.players-player-two-info` | Player 2 info container |
| `.players-player-two-innerinfo` | Player 2 info div |
| `.players-player-two-flag-img` | Player 2 flag |
| `.players-player-two-name` | Player 2 name |
| `.players-player-two-ranks` | Player 2 ranks |
| `.players-player-two-score` | Player 2 score |
| `.players-player-two-score-number` | Score number (Number style) |
| `.players-player-two-score-counter` | Score counter (Box style) |

## Pick & Bans

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.pbs-main-div` | Outer container (header + grid) |
| `.pbs-map-pool-div` | Map pool grid |
| `.pbs-no-maps` | Empty pool state |
| `.pbs-map-card-div` | Map card |
| `.pbs-map-image` | Map cover image |
| `.pbs-map-default-image` | Default cover (no image) |
| `.pbs-map-difficulty` | Difficulty color bar |
| `.pbs-map-difficulty-text` | Difficulty text |
| `.pbs-map-meta-outer` | Map meta outer |
| `.pbs-map-meta-inner` | Map meta inner |
| `.pbs-map-meta-author` | Song author |
| `.pbs-map-meta-song-name` | Song name |
| `.pbs-map-meta-mapper` | Mapper name |
| `.pbs-map-meta-right` | Meta right column |
| `.pbs-map-meta-key` | BeatSaver key |
| `.pbs-map-meta-picker` | Picker avatar |
| `.pbs-map-meta-bpm` | BPM container |
| `.pbs-map-meta-bpm-value` | BPM value |
| `.pbs-bottom-div` | Bottom bar |
| `.pbs-bottom-text` | Bottom text |
| `.pbs-map-default` | Default map (dark) |
| `.pbs-map-pick` | Picked map (green) |
| `.pbs-map-ban` | Banned map (red, reduced opacity) |
| `.pbs-map-tiebreaker` | Tiebreaker (yellow) |

## VS Screen (+ Upcoming Map)

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.vs-loading` | Loading container |
| `.vs-loading-text` | Loading text |
| `.vs-player-panel-tbd` | TBD player panel |
| `.vs-player-panel-tbd-text` | TBD text |
| `.vs-player-panel` | Player panel |
| `.vs-player-avatar-div` | Avatar container |
| `.vs-player-avatar-img` | Avatar image |
| `.vs-player-panel-innerdiv` | Inner div |
| `.vs-player-flag-img` | Country flag |
| `.vs-player-name-span` | Player name |
| `.vs-player-panel-score` | Score container |
| `.vs-player-panel-score-div` | Score div |
| `.vs-player-score` | Score value |
| `.vs-player-panel-no-score` | No score state |
| `.vs-player-panel-rank` | Player rank |
| `.stat-row-div` | Stat row |
| `.stat-row-label` | Stat label |
| `.stat-row-value` | Stat value |
| `.stat-cell-div` | Stat cell |
| `.stat-cell-label` | Stat cell label |
| `.stat-cell-value` | Stat cell value |
| `.vs-main-div` | Main VS div |
| `.vs-inner-div` | Inner div |
| `.vs-text-div` | VS text container |
| `.vs-text-label` | VS text label |
| `.vs-map-content-div` | Map content |
| `.vs-map-cover-diff-div` | Cover + diff container |
| `.vs-map-cover-image` | Map cover image |
| `.vs-map-cover-no-img` | No cover placeholder |
| `.vs-map-difficulty-bg` | Difficulty background |
| `.vs-map-difficulty-text-label` | Difficulty text |
| `.vs-map-meta-div` | Map meta |
| `.vs-map-meta-song-name` | Song name |
| `.vs-map-meta-subname` | Sub name |
| `.vs-map-meta-author` | Author |
| `.vs-map-meta-mapper` | Mapper |
| `.vs-map-stats` | Map stats container |
| `.vs-h2h-label` | H2H label |

## Credits Screen

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.credits-outer-div` | Outer container |
| `.credits-inner-div` | Inner container |
| `.credits-role-group` | Role group |
| `.credits-role-header` | Role header row |
| `.credits-role-accent-line` | Accent color bar |
| `.credits-role-label` | Role label |
| `.credits-role-divider` | Divider line |
| `.credits-members` | Members row |
| `.credits-member` | Member pill card |
| `.credits-member-avatar` | Member avatar |
| `.credits-member-name` | Member name |
| `.credits-member-flag` | Member country flag |

## Player Streams

Used in the Play Screen.

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.pov-stream-outer` | Outer wrapper |
| `.pov-stream-video-wrapper` | Video wrapper |
| `.pov-stream-video` | Video element |
| `.pov-stream-awaiting` | Awaiting stream state |
| `.pov-stream-offline` | Offline state |
| `.pov-stream-vignette` | Score vignette gradient |
| `.pov-stream-hud` | HUD overlay |
| `.pov-stream-hud-inner` | HUD inner row |
| `.pov-stream-player-info` | Player info (non-overlay variant) |
| `.pov-stream-avatar` | Avatar |
| `.pov-stream-username` | Username |
| `.pov-stream-scores` | Score block |
| `.pov-stream-combo-row` | Combo row |
| `.pov-stream-combo` | Combo value |
| `.pov-stream-fc` | FC badge |
| `.pov-stream-misses` | Miss counter |
| `.pov-stream-accuracy` | Accuracy |
| `.pov-stream-score` | Score |
| `.pov-stream-mvp-badge` | MVP badge (non-overlay, leading player) |
| `.pov-stream-mvp-text` | MVP text |
| `.pov-stream-reload` | Reload button |

## Map Card (shared component)

Used in Play Screen (footer) and Picks & Bans.

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.map-card` | Card container |
| `.map-card-default` | Default state |
| `.map-card-tiebreaker` | Tiebreaker state |
| `.map-card-cover` | Cover image |
| `.map-card-cover-placeholder` | No image placeholder |
| `.map-card-diff-bar` | Difficulty color bar |
| `.map-card-meta` | Meta container |
| `.map-card-meta-left` | Left column |
| `.map-card-song-author` | Song author |
| `.map-card-song-name` | Song name |
| `.map-card-mapper` | Mapper |
| `.map-card-meta-right` | Right column |
| `.map-card-key` | BeatSaver key |
| `.map-card-picker-avatar` | Picker avatar |
| `.map-card-bpm` | BPM label |
| `.map-card-bpm-value` | BPM value |

## Play Screen (1v1)

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.play-standby` | Standby outer container |
| `.play-standby-inner` | Standby inner container |
| `.play-standby-title` | Standby title |
| `.play-standby-label` | Standby label |
| `.play-standby-sublabel` | Standby sub-label |
| `.play-main` | Main container |
| `.play-content` | Content area |
| `.play-streams` | Streams row |
| `.play-stream-wrapper` | Per-player stream wrapper |
| `.play-replay-banner-wrapper` | Replay banner position wrapper |
| `.play-replay-banner` | Replay banner pill |
| `.play-replay-details` | Details expand area |
| `.play-replay-called-text` | "Replay Called" text |
| `.play-replay-icon` | Refresh icon |
| `.play-replay-target-label` | Target label |
| `.play-replay-target-acc` | Target accuracy |
| `.play-replay-target-score` | Target score |
| `.play-tug-of-war` | Tug-of-war bar |
| `.play-tug-p1` | Player 1 side (red) |
| `.play-tug-p2` | Player 2 side (blue) |
| `.play-map-footer` | Map footer |
| `.play-map-card-wrapper` | Map card fade wrapper |

## Idle Screen

| Selector | Element |
|---|---|
| `.idle-outer` | Outer container |
| `.idle-inner` | Inner container |
| `.idle-title-label` | Title |
| `.idle-status-label` | Status label |
